title: 目標達成の後に・ドン底から上を

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The date Tamamo Cross and I agreed upon has
finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've stuck to our plan to build her body up
before the spring Classics.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom... I can still eat a little more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Tamamo has managed to build up a healthy
appetite! As a result...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's more where that came from! Lemme show
ya what these legs can do!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! Ha! Like takin' candy from a baby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her body has undergone some major
developments. It's safe to say she's built up the
bare minimum amount of strength an athlete
needs.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Take a look, Trainer! Talk 'bout growth!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm good to start racing this year, right?! I've been
seein' it in my dreams, ya know. The—
choice_data_list: Half-off sale! To the bargain bin!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya think I'd fall for that?! I know all the upcomin'
sales 'round here, you're not foolin' me! I'm talkin'
about the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the type to get caught up in the
razzle-dazzle of it all. And I'm not gonna tell ya
it's my dream to win that Triple Crown or anythin'.
But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It sure would be nice to have somethin' to show
people. Even the tykes back home know 'bout the
Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I wanna tell 'em their big sis bagged herself that
same crown...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I understand how she feels. But...
choice_data_list: I don't think we should set the bar that high.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Are you sayin'... my body's not there yet?
choice_data_list: Yeah, we need you to be stronger.
Yeah, we need you to be stronger.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Can't you do me this one favor? C'mooon.
Pleeeease?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Giving Tamamo Cross the okay now would be the
same as throwing her future away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's in tip-top shape when the time comes, I
don't mind tackling the Triple Crown with her. I
just don't want to have it as a goal until I know
she's not going to get pushed around.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So how long's it gonna be? How long do I gotta
wait before I can take on the big dogs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I had to make an objective estimate based on
our current progress...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! You sayin' I gotta spend my whole classic
year waitin' around?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...All right, fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To my surprise, Tamamo Cross readily agrees to
the plan, but I can see from the look in her eyes
that she's beyond frustrated...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess that's just how it is at Tracen Academy...
Talented runners from all over the country gather
here, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But unlike the other students, I never took any
special classes. No way my folks could afford
that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...It's not easy tryin' to make it big in a world so
different from your own.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But don't you dare think I'm gonna let anyone tell
me I can't! I come from rock bottom, so trust
me—I'm used to lookin' towards the top.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not the only one strugglin' in this new
world... There's plenty more like me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Some of 'em are fresh outta the boonies. But
they're still dreamin' big, just like me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm not losin' to nobody! Not to the competition,
not to society, not even to myself!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Don't get me wrong. I'm pissed. But I'm gonna hold it all in... for now. That way, come this time next year, I can let it all out on the track!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now the ball's in your court, Trainer. Make me a
plan that'll turn me into a legend!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some thinking, I come up with a strategy.
We'll enter a whole load of graded races to build
up experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The experience she'll get from them will balance
out any struggles she faces going up against the
pack with her weaker body.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I getcha... If I can push through the rest of the
pack with sheer guts, gettin' into the top three
shouldn't be that tough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A'ight! Let's go with that then. But this plan better
work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Tamamo Cross's approval, we settle on our
new strategy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heya, Dad, what's up? Yeah, things are goin' well.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, same old, same old, got my nose to the
grindstone. I'm like those stubborn merchants in
Naniwa. I'm not budging till I get what I came
here for. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I'm gonna have any big news for ya
this year. But next year... I'll be there. I'm gonna
run in that race ya love, Dad.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Anyways, how're things?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mom? What about her? Somethin' happen?
Nothin' serious? Well, if you say so...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When she's lookin' tired, I want ya to be there for
her. Just watch some TV together or something.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Speakin' of, the graded races should be on TV,
yeah? Hehe. Whaddaya know? Maybe seein' me
will help ya two finally relax.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Just make sure ya don't work too hard, 'kay? I'll
do the same. All right, bye now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We need to place third or higher in four graded
races. With that goal in mind, it's time to aim for
the skies.
